title: thelypteris stenopodum
intro: Thelypteris stenopodum, also known as the forked fern or forked maiden's hair, is a species of fern in the family Thelypteridaceae. This plant is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Thelypteris stenopodum include reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and soothing digestive problems. Thelypteris stenopodum is traditionally prepared as a tea by infusing the leaves in hot water, or it can be used as a poultice or compress to apply directly to affected areas.
